name: Apple Watch Charger - heyday™ Black
description:
The Apple Watch Charger from heyday™ offers a convenient magnetic mount for easy charging. With a 6-foot cable, it provides flexibility in placement and easy setup. The charger delivers a 5-watt output and connects via USB-C, ensuring efficient power delivery. The compact design makes it easy to carry, making it a practical choice for keeping your Apple Watches powered up.

heyday™: Let your style speak volumes.
